title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, York, Celestial Dragons, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Dragon as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We ACCOM- PlishED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KAMABAKA QUEENOM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...every- thing we set out to do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All three objectives were taken care of!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We officially declared war...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: By destroying the celestial Dragon's symbol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We rescued Kuma-San...

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: and freed as many slaves as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Finally, we managed to find and destroy...

dialogue.speaker: Celestial Dragons
dialogue.text: The Holy Land's Food Reserves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what was the fallout?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it was nothing to sneeze at... but we got the world's attention,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the navy ended up sending in the big guns...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, we triggered uprisings in 12 nations...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: where we held strong influence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: eight of which were successful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, you say eight were successful....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But one of them vanished! The kingdom of Lula!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The headlines censored everything, but the seven others have all declared...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their intent to no longer pay the celestial tribute or comply with the explosive exporting of their resources.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of that, the revolutionary army is attackingk government supply carriers all over the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To stop resources from reachingk Mary Geouse!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say the Holy Land's High Up location...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: makes it an imperetrable fortress...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we'll see how they like LVINGK under siege!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THEYLL FINALLY GET A TASTE OF WHAT IT IS TO LOVE IN POVERTY AND GO HUNGRY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HEE HAW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's what I call a result!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: indeed. We may not be able to cut off all their supplies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're squeezing them slowly but surely. They must be struggling by now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As expected though, they're not a foe who will just take all this lying down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our real battle will start when they mobilize...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: God's knights.

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
